rule: A tap passes only when the native product screen satisfies the specific user intent. Central contract-runtime feedback is excluded.

results.expectedResult: Open the promised destination without a broken route or unrelated screen.
results.observedResult: Promised destination opened.

results.expectedResult: Produce a meaningful native screen result that explains what changed or what the user can do next.
results.observedResult: The screen explained the required input and kept the user in the current task.
results.nativeSignal: Choose a public YouTube link or connect your channel. No Google permission is requested until you continue. | Connect your YouTube channel MoolSocial will open Google authorization only after you continue. × ✓ View your channel identity and public content list ✓ Validate availability and embedding status ✓ Refresh the connection until you revoke access — MoolSocial cannot edit or delete your YouTube videos You can cancel now, deny access on Google, revoke later or reconnect after expiry. Link paste remains available. Cancel Continue to Google
